description: Success.ai is a cold email platform with 700M+ verified contacts, email warmup, and AI writing for B2B outreach.
tagline: Leads, email warmup, and AI writing in one platform
overview: Success.ai helps B2B teams find and reach ideal customers with access to more than 700 million verified contacts, email warmup, and AI-assisted writing for outreach.
what_is: Success.ai is a B2B sales and marketing platform that helps teams find and reach ideal customers. It provides access to more than 700 million verified contacts with emails and phone numbers, plus AI tools that support unlimited searches and verified data.

It is strongest for sales outreach, account-based marketing, and fundraising, letting users export and contact leads quickly. Success.ai works as a lead finder, email sender, and enrichment layer that supports multichannel outreach and CRM workflows, focusing on lead discovery and initial contact rather than deep analytics.
